subject: Purugly, a large round cat Pokemon with its tails wrapped around its midsection, standing on coastal rocks
description: A large, round-bodied cat creature crouches on rocky coastal ground. Its body is gray-blue with a white underbelly and pale purple markings around the face and ears. Its two tails are conspicuously wrapped tightly around its midsection, giving it a cinched, belted appearance. Its expression is deeply scowling — angular eyes narrowed in displeasure, posture tense and grounded. Behind it, a stretch of calm blue-green ocean is visible, with green hills in the far distance under a partly cloudy sky.
foreground: large round cat creature with tails wrapped around its waist, crouching on rocks
background: coastal ocean with green hills and pale sky
emotion: deeply scowling, aggressive displeasure, territorial posture
